mnemonics: Hadoop Stores, Spark Speeds, Hive Queries
keyPoints: Hadoop HDFS provides distributed storage for large datasets
Apache Spark enables fast in-memory data processing and analytics
Apache Hive offers a SQL-like interface for querying data stored in Hadoop
commonMistakes: Thinking Hadoop is for real-time processing (it's batch-oriented)
Using Spark only for simple tasks when it excels at complex analytics
Assuming Hive queries are as fast as traditional SQL databases
